EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation of payment to settle outstanding Close Brothers balance.
EmailTemplate.name: Payment Taken
EmailTemplate.subject: Payment Confirmation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Please accept this email as confirmation that a card payment of £000.00 has been processed today to settle the outstanding balance of your Close Brothers Premium Finance account.
(Delete as required) I have sent a request to Close Brothers to cancel your Direct Debit agreement and they will write to you with confirmation of this.
If you have any questions then please do not hesitate to contact us.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
